buildCommand: node scripts/generate-og-image.mjs && node scripts/generate-favicon.mjs && npm run build --workspace=packages/dashboard && cp index.html packages/dashboard/dist/ && cp privacy.html packages/dashboard/dist/ && cp terms.html packages/dashboard/dist/ && cp robots.txt packages/dashboard/dist/ && cp sitemap.xml packages/dashboard/dist/ && cp og-image.png packages/dashboard/dist/ && cp favicon.png packages/dashboard/dist/
